headline: Wawanesa to acquire Everest Insurance Company of Canada
summary: Transaction broadens Wawanesa’s commercial insurance capabilities and reinforces its commitment to serving more CanadiansWINNIPEG, Manitoba, March 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company (“Wawanesa”) announced today it has entered into an agreement to acquire Everest Insurance Company of Canada (“Everest Canada”), the Canadian Retail Insurance operations of Everest Group, Ltd. headline: Everest Announces Agreement to Sell Canadian Retail Insurance Operations to The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company
summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, March 23, 2026--Everest Group, Ltd. ("Everest" or "the Company") (NYSE: EG), a global specialty reinsurance and insurance leader, today announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to sell its Canadian Retail Insurance operations, Everest Insurance Company of Canada ("Everest Canada"), to The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company ("Wawanesa").
